2606.25941.title: Explainable Control Framework (XCF) based on Fuzzy Model-Agnostic Explanation and LLM Agent-Supported Interface
2606.25941.paper_summary: Increasing demand for precise and reliable control in complex scenarios has led to the development of increasingly sophisticated controllers, including data-driven approaches employing closed box models and mathematically rigorous yet complex designs. This complexity highlights the needs for explainable control that can provide human-understandable insights into controller behavior. In this paper, an explainable control framework (XCF) along with supporting algorithms and user interface are proposed to explain how controllers determine their control actions and their underlying working mechanism. The novel contributions of this work are threefold: First, the XCF is designed to provide model-agnostic explanations for controllers in closed-loop systems and can optionally refine local explanations by system response dynamics. Second, a novel explanation method, hierarchical fuzzy model-agnostic explanation for control systems (HFMAE-C), is proposed based on the designed framework. The HFMAE-C employs a fuzzy logic system to approximate the controller's behavior and system dynamics, providing sample, local, domain and universe level explanations via IF-THEN rules revealing the controller's decision logic and salience values quantifying the contribution of system states to control actions. Third, a large language model agent-supported user interface is developed to automatically analyze user requirements, select appropriate algorithms, interpret the generated explanations to a natural language report, and provide interactive consultation. Case studies on inverted pendulum system and Turtlebot obstacle avoidance demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method through simulated user experiments and quantitative comparisons with mainstream explainable control approaches.
2606.25941.paper_summary_zh: 隨著對於在複雜情境中精確且可靠控制需求的增加，越來越多的先進控制器被開發出來，包括使用封閉盒模型和數學上嚴謹但複雜設計的數據驅動方法。這種複雜性突顯了可解釋控制的需求，該控制能夠提供人類可理解的控制器行為見解。在本論文中，提出了一個可解釋控制框架（XCF），以及支持算法和用戶界面，以解釋控制器如何確定其控制行動及其背後的工作機制。這項工作的創新貢獻有三個方面：首先，XCF旨在為封閉迴路系統中的控制器提供模型無關的解釋，並可以選擇根據系統響應動態來細化局部解釋。其次，基於設計的框架，提出了一種新穎的解釋方法，即控制系統的層次模糊模型無關解釋（HFMAE-C）。HFMAE-C利用模糊邏輯系統來近似控制器的行為和系統動態，通過IF-THEN規則提供樣本、本地、領域和宇宙級別的解釋，揭示控制器的決策邏輯和量化系統狀態對控制行動貢獻的顯著性值。第三，開發了一個大型語言模型代理支持的用戶界面，自動分析用戶需求，選擇合適的算法，將生成的解釋轉化為自然語言報告，並提供互動諮詢。對倒立擺系統和Turtlebot障礙物避免的案例研究通過模擬用戶實驗和與主流可解釋控制方法的定量比較，展示了所提方法的有效性。
2606.25941.author: Faliang Yin et.al.
2606.25941.authors: Faliang Yin, Hak-Keung Lam, David Watson
